title: "King Of Kings And Lord Of Lords" I Timothy 6:13-21

notes.introduction: An exposition of 1 Timothy 6:13-21 on the charge Paul issues to Timothy at the close of the letter, organized around three motivating truths: God's power, God's position as King of Kings and Lord of Lords, and God's plan centered on the return of Christ.

sections.heading: The Charge to Keep and Continue
God's Power: He Quickeneth All Things
Christ Before Pilate and Power Over Death
God's Position: King of Kings and Lord of Lords
God's Plan: The Appearing of Christ
Scoffers, the Promise, and God's Long-Suffering
Closing Application and Summary of Three Truths
